topic_title: US trade court strikes down Donald Trump's 10 percent universal tariffs
topic_summary: A US trade court has ruled that the 10 percent global tariffs imposed by Donald Trump are illegal. The ruling comes as Trump issues an ultimatum to European trade partners to reach an agreement by July 4 and prepares for a high-stakes summit with Xi Jinping in Beijing.

findings.title: US trade court says Trump's 10% global tariffs are illegal
findings.summary: Three-judge panel says proclamation Trump signed to impose work-around duties is 'invalid, and the tariffs imposed on plaintiffs are unauthorized by law'
findings.text: US trade court says Trump's 10% global tariffs are illegal | Three-judge panel says proclamation Trump signed to impose work-around duties is 'invalid, and the tariffs imposed on plaintiffs are unauthorized by law'

findings.title: Trump da ultimátum a Europa: Impondrá más aranceles si no aprueban acuerdo comercial antes del 4 de julio
findings.summary: El presidente de Estados Unidos amagó con imponer tasas arancelarias más altas a importaciones de la UE ante el retraso del Parlamento Europeo para ratificar el acuerdo comercial.
findings.text: Trump da ultimátum a Europa: Impondrá más aranceles si no aprueban acuerdo comercial antes del 4 de julio | El presidente de Estados Unidos amagó con imponer tasas arancelarias más altas a importaciones de la UE ante el retraso del Parlamento Europeo para ratificar el acuerdo comercial.

findings.title: Dan ‘revés’ judicial a Trump: Tribunal de EU bloquea su arancel global del 10% por ser ilegal
findings.summary: Un tribunal de EU bloqueó la imposición de un arancel global del 10% a la mayoría de las importaciones; Trump usó incorrectamente una ley.
findings.text: Dan ‘revés’ judicial a Trump: Tribunal de EU bloquea su arancel global del 10% por ser ilegal | Un tribunal de EU bloqueó la imposición de un arancel global del 10% a la mayoría de las importaciones; Trump usó incorrectamente una ley.

findings.title: Trump gives EU ultimatum deadline to approve trade deal with US
findings.summary: Trump's deadline to the European Union came as a trade court ruled his global tariff policy violated US law.
findings.text: Trump gives EU ultimatum deadline to approve trade deal with US | Trump's deadline to the European Union came as a trade court ruled his global tariff policy violated US law.

findings.title: Trump walks back threat to rip up part of EU trade deal but tells bloc to ratify by 4 July
findings.summary: US president expresses impatience at speed of EU’s implementation and warns of ‘much higher’ tariffsUS trade court rules against Trump’s 10% global tariffsBusiness live – latest updatesDonald Trump has walked back from his threat to tear up part of the US trade deal with the EU by hiking tariffs on car imports.The US president has given the EU until 4 July to implement its side of the deal, reducing tariffs to zero on most American imports, warning that the bloc would face “much higher” tarif...

findings.title: US court deals fresh blow to Trump's 10% global tariff policy
findings.summary: A US federal court said President Donald Trump overstepped his authority when he invoked a section of a 1974 trade law to enact the 10% global tariff policy.
findings.text: US court deals fresh blow to Trump's 10% global tariff policy | A US federal court said President Donald Trump overstepped his authority when he invoked a section of a 1974 trade law to enact the 10% global tariff policy.

findings.title: Trump gives EU until July 4 to implement trade deal
findings.summary: Trump has threatened to impose higher tariffs on the bloc if it doesn't implement the trade deal agreed last year by his deadline.
findings.text: Trump gives EU until July 4 to implement trade deal | Trump has threatened to impose higher tariffs on the bloc if it doesn't implement the trade deal agreed last year by his deadline.

findings.title: Trade court strikes down Trump 10% universal tariffs
findings.summary: The Court of International Trade on Thursday ruled that President Trump's newest round of tariffs were illegal — but the duties will keep collecting for most importers while the administration appeals.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​Why it matters: It is yet another legal setback for the White House's trade policy — this time ruling against the suite of tariffs that officials imposed to replace those struck down by the Supreme Court.State of play: Trump turned to Section 122 — a never-before-used provision o...
findings.text: Trade court strikes down Trump 10% universal tariffs | The Court of International Trade on Thursday ruled that President Trump's newest round of tariffs were illegal — but the duties will keep collecting for most importers while the administration appeals.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​Why it matters: It is yet another legal setback for the White House's trade policy — this time ruling against the suite of tariffs that officials imposed to replace those struck down by the Supreme Court.State of play: Trump turned to Section 122 — a never-before-used provision o...

findings.title: US trade court rules against Trump's global 10% tariff
findings.summary: The Court of International Trade ruling, which was 2-1 against Trump's 10% global tariff, ordered defendants to implement the decision within five days, and for the importers who sued to receive refunds.
findings.text: US trade court rules against Trump's global 10% tariff | The Court of International Trade ruling, which was 2-1 against Trump's 10% global tariff, ordered defendants to implement the decision within five days, and for the importers who sued to receive refunds.

findings.title: US-Handelsgericht erklärt Trumps weltweite Zölle für unzulässig
findings.summary: Neuer Rückschlag für den Präsidenten: Ein US-Handelsgericht hat Trumps globalen Zehn-Prozent-Zoll für unrechtmäßig erklärt. Grundlage dafür war ein Gesetz aus dem Jahr 1974, das laut Gericht falsch ausgelegt wurde.
findings.text: US-Handelsgericht erklärt Trumps weltweite Zölle für unzulässig | Neuer Rückschlag für den Präsidenten: Ein US-Handelsgericht hat Trumps globalen Zehn-Prozent-Zoll für unrechtmäßig erklärt. Grundlage dafür war ein Gesetz aus dem Jahr 1974, das laut Gericht falsch ausgelegt wurde.

findings.title: Trump setzt der EU ein Ultimatum für den vereinbarten Zoll-Deal
findings.summary: US-Präsident Trump hat die Europäische Union zur Umsetzung eines im vergangenen Jahr vereinbarten Handelsabkommens aufgefordert. Sollte dies nicht bis zum 4. Juli geschehen, droht er mit neuen Strafzöllen.
findings.text: Trump setzt der EU ein Ultimatum für den vereinbarten Zoll-Deal | US-Präsident Trump hat die Europäische Union zur Umsetzung eines im vergangenen Jahr vereinbarten Handelsabkommens aufgefordert. Sollte dies nicht bis zum 4. Juli geschehen, droht er mit neuen Strafzöllen.

findings.title: Трамп пригрозил повысить пошлины на европейские товары, если ЕС не снизит свои тарифы до нуля к 4 июля
findings.summary: США после 4 июля поднимут пошлины на европейские товары, если Евросоюз не выполнит свои обязательства по торговому соглашению и по отмене пошлин на американскую продукцию, сообщил президент Соединенных Штатов Дональд Трамп.
findings.text: Трамп пригрозил повысить пошлины на европейские товары, если ЕС не снизит свои тарифы до нуля к 4 июля | США после 4 июля поднимут пошлины на европейские товары, если Евросоюз не выполнит свои обязательства по торговому соглашению и по отмене пошлин на американскую продукцию, сообщил президент Соединенных Штатов Дональд Трамп.

findings.summary: Los jueces argumentan que el presidente no puede acogerse a la Ley de Comercio de 1974 para aprobar los gravámenes
